```{r Bibliotekos, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(car)
```

# Duomenys

```{r}
data <- read.csv("../datasets/gbsg.csv")
data <- data %>% select(-X)

data$meno <- as.factor(data$meno)
data$hormon <- as.factor(data$hormon)
data$status <- as.factor(data$status)

str(data)
```
# Pradinė analizė

```{r}
summary(data)
```

Cenzuravimas is desines, atstitiktinis, nes i tyrima paceintai itraukti skirtingais laikais, kiekvienas stebetas skirtinga trukme

Cenzūruotų stebėjimų dalis

```{r}
attach(data)
prop.table(table(status == 1))
```

```{r}
table(meno)

table(hormon)

table(meno, status)

table(hormon, status)
```

```{r}
char <- data %>% 
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric),
            list(min = ~min(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 
                 max = ~max(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                 mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 
                 sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                 q25 = ~quantile(.x, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
                 median = ~median(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                 q75 = ~quantile(.x, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)))) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), 
               names_to = c("Variable", ".value"),
               names_pattern = "(.*)_(min|max|mean|sd|median|q25|q75)") %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
char
```

```{r}
data_long <- data %>%
  dplyr::select(-status, -hormon, -meno, -pid, -grade) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(), 
    names_to = "variable", 
    values_to = "value"
  )

data_long$variable <- as.factor(data_long$variable)

data_long %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = variable, y = value, fill = variable)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = 'none')
```



```{r}
status_num <- as.numeric(as.character(data$status))

km_overall <- survfit(Surv(rfstime, status_num) ~ 1, data = data)
ggsurvplot(km_overall,
           data       = data,
           conf.int   = TRUE,
           xlab       = "Laikas (dienos)",
           ylab       = "Išgyvenamumo tikimybė",
           title      = "Kaplan-Meier kreivė (visi pacientai)",
           ggtheme    = theme_minimal())
```

```{r}
# KM pagal menopauzę
km_meno <- survfit(Surv(rfstime, status_num) ~ meno, data = data)
ggsurvplot(km_meno,
           data       = data,
           conf.int   = TRUE,
           pval       = TRUE,   # log-rank testas
           legend.labs = c("Prieš menopauzę", "Po menopauzės"),
           xlab       = "Laikas (dienos)",
           title      = "KM kreivė pagal menopauzę",
           ggtheme    = theme_minimal())
```

```{r}
# KM pagal hormoninę terapiją
km_hormon <- survfit(Surv(rfstime, status_num) ~ hormon, data = data)
ggsurvplot(km_hormon,
           data        = data,
           conf.int    = TRUE,
           pval        = TRUE,
           legend.labs = c("Be terapijos", "Su terapija"),
           xlab        = "Laikas (dienos)",
           title       = "KM kreivė pagal hormoninę terapiją",
           ggtheme     = theme_minimal())
```

```{r}
# KM pagal naviko laipsnį
km_grade <- survfit(Surv(rfstime, status_num) ~ grade, data = data)
ggsurvplot(km_grade,
           data        = data,
           conf.int    = TRUE,
           pval        = TRUE,
           xlab        = "Laikas (dienos)",
           title       = "KM kreivė pagal naviko laipsnį",
           ggtheme     = theme_minimal())
```

```{r}
data$status_num <- status_num
data$statusLabel <- ifelse(status_num == 1, "Įvykis", "Cenzūruota")

kiekybiniai_vars <- c("age", "size", "nodes", "pgr", "er")

plots <- lapply(kiekybiniai_vars, function(var) {
  ggplot(data, aes_string(x = var, y = "rfstime",
                          color = "statusLabel",
                          shape = "statusLabel")) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Įvykis" = "firebrick",
                                  "Cenzūruota" = "steelblue")) +
    labs(title = paste("rfstime ~", var),
         x = var, y = "Laikas (dienos)",
         color = "Statusas", shape = "Statusas") +
    theme_minimal()
})

library(gridExtra)
grid.arrange(grobs = plots, ncol = 2)
```


```{r}
data$meno   <- as.factor(data$meno)
data$grade  <- as.factor(data$grade)
data$hormon <- as.factor(data$hormon)
```

# Kokso modelis

```{r}
status_num <- as.numeric(as.character(data$status))

cox_full <- coxph(Surv(rfstime, status_num) ~ 
                    age + meno + size + grade + 
                    nodes + pgr + er + hormon, data = data)
summary(cox_full)
```

## Multikolinearumas

```{r}
vif(cox_full)
```


## Išskirtys

```{r}
2 / sqrt(686)
```

```{r}
dfbeta <- residuals(cox_full, type="dfbeta")
par(mfrow=c(2, 2))
for (j in 1:9) {
  plot(dfbeta[, j],
  ylab=names(coef(cox_full))[j])
  abline(h=0, lty=2)
}
```



## PH prielaida

```{r}
ph_test <- cox.zph(cox_full)
print(ph_test)
plot(ph_test)
```


```{r}
unfold_data <- function(data, time = "tenure", event = "Churn") {
  out <- data[rep(seq_len(nrow(data)), pmax(data[[time]], 1)), ]
  
  out$start <- unlist(lapply(data[[time]], function(t) {
    if (t <= 0) 0 else seq(0, t - 1)
  }))
  
  out$stop <- unlist(lapply(data[[time]], function(t) {
    if (t <= 0) 1 else seq(1, t)
  }))
  
  out[[event]] <- 0
  
  last_rows <- cumsum(pmax(data[[time]], 1))
  out[[event]][last_rows] <- data[[event]]
  
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}
```


```{r}
data_long_daily <- unfold_data(
  data = data, 
  time = "rfstime",
  event = "status_num"
)
```


```{r}
model_daily <- coxph(
  Surv(start, stop, status_num) ~ 
    age + meno + size + grade + nodes + pgr + er + hormon + meno:stop, 
  data = data_long_daily)
```
```{r}
summary(model_daily)
```

```{r}
ph_test <- cox.zph(model_daily)
print(ph_test)
plot(ph_test)
```

## Tiesiškumo prielaida

```{r}
par(mfrow=c(2, 2))
res <- residuals(cox_full, type="martingale")
X <- as.matrix(data[, c("age", "size")]) # matrix of covariates
for (j in 1:2) { # residual plots
plot(X[, j], res, xlab=c("age", "size")[j], ylab="residuals")
abline(h=0, lty=2)
lines(lowess(X[, j], res, iter=0))
}
b <- coef(cox_full)[c(2,3)] # regression coefficients
for (j in 1:2) { # component-plus-residual plots
plot(X[, j], b[j]*X[, j] + res, xlab=c("age", "size")[j],
ylab="component+residual")
abline(lm(b[j]*X[, j] + res ~ X[, j]), lty=2)
lines(lowess(X[, j], b[j]*X[, j] + res, iter=0))
}
par(mfrow=c(1, 1))
```

```{r}
par(mfrow=c(2, 2))
res <- residuals(cox_full, type="martingale")
X <- as.matrix(data[, c("nodes", "pgr")]) # matrix of covariates
for (j in 1:2) { # residual plots
plot(X[, j], res, xlab=c("nodes", "pgr")[j], ylab="residuals")
abline(h=0, lty=2)
lines(lowess(X[, j], res, iter=0))
}
b <- coef(cox_full)[c(2,3)] # regression coefficients
for (j in 1:2) { # component-plus-residual plots
plot(X[, j], b[j]*X[, j] + res, xlab=c("nodes", "pgr")[j],
ylab="component+residual")
abline(lm(b[j]*X[, j] + res ~ X[, j]), lty=2)
lines(lowess(X[, j], b[j]*X[, j] + res, iter=0))
}
par(mfrow=c(1, 1))
```
